channel.title: SpeakForWater
channel.description: Making water resources research accessible to everyone. Join Anna and Ehsan as they discuss the latest open-access papers on hydrology, flood management, remote sensing, and water engineering — explained in plain language for farmers, water managers, and anyone who cares about water.
channel.itunes:author: Ehsan Kahrizi

item.title: Ep 4: Hydrological and Geochemical Modeling of Water Availability and Quality in the Jordan Valley Under Climate Change
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 4: Hydrological and Geochemical Modeling of Water Availability and Quality in the Jordan Valley Under Climate Change. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/721/pdf

item.title: Ep 3: Contrasting Climatic and Land-Use Controls Structure Nutrient and Turbidity Regimes Across Mediterranean River Basins
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 3: Contrasting Climatic and Land-Use Controls Structure Nutrient and Turbidity Regimes Across Mediterranean River Basins. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/728/pdf

item.title: Ep 2: Global Agricultural Drought Crisis: Synergistic Impacts of Climate Change and Human Activities and Their Feedback Mechanisms
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 2: Global Agricultural Drought Crisis: Synergistic Impacts of Climate Change and Human Activities and Their Feedback Mechanisms. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/732/pdf?version=1773994726

item.title: Ep 1: Baffle-Enhanced Scour Mitigation in Rectangular and Trapezoidal Piano Key Weirs: An Experimental and Machine Learning Investigation
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 1: Baffle-Enhanced Scour Mitigation in Rectangular and Trapezoidal Piano Key Weirs: An Experimental and Machine Learning Investigation . A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/16/15/2133?utm_campaign=releaseissue_waterutm_medium=emailutm_source=releaseissueutm_term=doilink109
